arts.ttl: AC Milan enter discussions with Chelsea for João Felix
arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe journalist Tanzi Loïc, AC Milan have entered discussions with Chelsea for João Felix (25) on transfer deadline day. Felix only arrived at Chelsea on…

arts.ttl: West Ham set to beat Arsenal, Man Utd to 'statement' signing; Chelsea to sell two England stars
arts.sum: The website’s transfer correspondent, Pete O’Rourke, insists that there is a “good chance” West Ham will beat Arsenal, Man Utd, Chelsea and other clubs to the signing of the England international. West Ham have reportedly taken the lead in the race to sign Brentford striker Ivan Toney amid interest from Arsenal, Man Utd and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: “Agreement reached” | ExWHUEmployee | West Ham secure return of midfielder
arts.sum: West Ham have negotiated the return of James Ward-Prowse from his loan move to Nottingham Forest. The former Southampton captain was made available by the previous Head Coach and his team, with Forest taking the midfielder on a season long loan, however its now been agreed Ward-Prowse will head back to east London to work... The post “Agreement reached” | ExWHUEmployee | West Ham secure return of midfielder appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Fabrizio Romano CONFIRMS surprise Ben Chilwell deal
arts.sum: Transfer expert Fabrizio Romano confirmed the deal with a post that read: “Ben Chilwell, set for medical tests now at Crystal Palace to join the club on loan. Crystal Palace have reached a full agreement to sign Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell on loan until the end of the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: £50m Chelsea player is having his medical at Premier League club right now, documents are approved - Romano
arts.sum: Looks as if he'll be on the move today...

arts.ttl: Sky Sports: West Ham Offer for Striker After Ferguson Rejected, New Bid Planned
arts.sum: West Ham are set to add one striker to their first-team but could see a further talisman join their youth ranks

arts.ttl: Joao Felix: Chelsea's transfer demands made clear amid AC Milan, Aston Villa interest
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly still weighing up whether to allow Joao Felix to leave Stamford Bridge before the transfer window closes amid interest from AC Milan and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: ‘Full agreement’ reached with Chelsea for Blues man’s transfer – Travels for medical on Monday
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Carney Chukwuemeka is set to join Borussia Dortmund on deadline day of the winter market. That’s according to Sky Deutschland journalist Patrick Berger, who took to X, formerly known as Twitter, to share multiple updates. He initially reported BVB didn’t have an agreement with Chelsea, but there was confidence the move will go through. The post ‘Full agreement’ reached with Chelsea for Blues man’s transfer – Travels for medical on Monday appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender undergoing Crystal Palace medical
arts.sum: Ben Chilwell is set to undergo a medical at Crystal Palace today ahead of his loan move to the club from Chelsea. Chilwell has been frozen out at Chelsea this season with new head coach Enzo Maresca having informed the defender he does not feature in his plans. The 28-year-old has featured for just 45 […] The post Chelsea defender undergoing Crystal Palace medical first appeared on The Football Faithful.
